fields.name: serviceId
fields.label: Service ID
fields.description: Unique identifier used for hover states and routing (e.g. 'research', 'strategy')

fields.name: icon
fields.label: Icon
fields.description: Phosphor icon name

fields.name: order
fields.label: Display Order
fields.description: Controls the position on the arc (0 = bottom-left, 3 = bottom-right)

fields.name: shortBio
fields.label: Short Bio
fields.description: Brief bio shown in article sidebars (1-2 sentences)

fields.name: bio
fields.label: Full Bio
fields.description: Full biography shown on the team member profile page

fields.name: photoUrl
fields.label: Photo
fields.description: Headshot image for team member and author bio sections

fields.name: displayOrder
fields.label: Display Order
fields.description: Order in team listings (lower numbers appear first)

fields.name: active
fields.label: Active
fields.description: Show this team member on the site

fields.name: slug
fields.label: Slug
fields.description: URL-friendly version of the name (lowercase, hyphens only)

fields.name: icon
fields.label: Placeholder Icon
fields.description: Icon shown on article cards when no featured image is set

fields.name: placeholderColor
fields.label: Placeholder Color
fields.description: Accent color for the placeholder icon and gradient (hex, e.g. #00AEEF)

fields.name: client
fields.label: Client
fields.description: Client or brand name (e.g. 'LYCRA + QIRA', 'Tribes On The Edge')

fields.name: service
fields.label: Service
fields.description: Primary service type for this work

fields.name: description
fields.label: Description
fields.description: Brief project description / excerpt (1-2 sentences)

fields.name: featuredImage
fields.label: Featured Image
fields.description: Main image displayed in work listings and social sharing

fields.name: videoUrl
fields.label: Video URL
fields.description: Vimeo or YouTube embed URL

fields.name: seoTitle
fields.label: SEO Title
fields.description: Custom title for search engines (defaults to title if empty)

fields.name: seoDescription
fields.label: SEO Description
fields.description: Custom meta description for search engines (max 160 characters)

fields.name: featured
fields.label: Featured
fields.description: Display this work in featured/hero sections

fields.name: description
fields.label: Description
fields.description: Brief summary for SEO and social sharing (max 160 characters)

fields.name: featuredImage
fields.label: Featured Image
fields.description: Main image displayed in post listings and social sharing

fields.name: featured
fields.label: Featured Post
fields.description: Display this post in featured sections

fields.name: attribution
fields.label: Attribution
fields.description: Who said this (optional)

fields.name: slug
fields.label: Slug
fields.description: URL path for this page (e.g. 'about', 'services')

fields.name: backgroundVideoUrl
fields.label: Background Video URL
fields.description: Direct MP4 URL for the looping background video

fields.name: vimeoId
fields.label: Vimeo Video ID
fields.description: Vimeo video ID for the play modal (e.g. '1153662802')

fields.name: canvasVariant
fields.label: Canvas Variant
fields.description: Optional custom canvas background (leave empty for default plexus)

fields.name: vimeoUrl
fields.label: Vimeo URL
fields.description: Full Vimeo URL (standard or unlisted)

fields.name: posterSrc
fields.label: Poster Image
fields.description: Fallback image shown while video loads

fields.name: bottomFade
fields.label: Bottom Fade
fields.description: Show a gradient that bleeds into the next section

fields.name: featureImageSrc
fields.label: Feature Image
fields.description: Decorative image shown on the right side of the hero

fields.name: highlightsDescription
fields.label: Highlights Box Description
fields.description: Optional paragraph shown inside the highlights box above the bullet items

fields.name: highlights
fields.label: Highlight Items
fields.description: Service items shown in a bordered box on the hero

fields.name: highlightColor
fields.label: Highlight Border Color
fields.description: Accent color for the highlight box border and bullet dots

fields.name: highlightsInRight
fields.label: Highlights on Right
fields.description: Move the highlights box (and feature image) to a right column, keeping title/subtitle/CTA on the left

fields.name: defaultActiveIndex
fields.label: Default Expanded Card
fields.description: Index of the card expanded on page load (0-based)

fields.name: ctaLabel
fields.label: CTA Text
fields.description: Default: 'Find Out More'

fields.name: categories
fields.label: Filter Categories
fields.description: 'All' is prepended automatically

fields.name: speed
fields.label: Scroll Speed
fields.description: Pixels per second (default: 40)

fields.name: src
fields.label: Logo Image
fields.description: SVG or PNG with transparent background recommended

fields.name: allowMultiple
fields.label: Allow Multiple Open
fields.description: Let users open multiple FAQ items at once

fields.name: sectionLabel
fields.label: Section Label
fields.description: Small uppercase label above the content

fields.name: stickyLeft
fields.label: Sticky Left Column
fields.description: Make the left column sticky on desktop scroll

fields.name: defaultActiveIndex
fields.label: Default Expanded Card
fields.description: Index of the card expanded on page load (0-based)

fields.name: ctaLabel
fields.label: CTA Text
fields.description: Default: 'Find Out More'

fields.name: defaultActiveIndex
fields.label: Default Expanded Card
fields.description: Index of the card expanded on page load (0-based)

fields.name: ctaLabel
fields.label: CTA Text
fields.description: Default: 'Find Out More'

fields.name: sectionLabel
fields.label: Section Label
fields.description: Small uppercase label above heading

fields.name: columns
fields.label: Columns
fields.description: Number of columns (default: 3)

fields.name: defaultActiveIndex
fields.label: Default Active Tab
fields.description: Index of the tab active on page load (0-based)

fields.name: body
fields.label: Body Text
fields.description: Use **bold** for emphasis. Separate paragraphs with blank lines. Start lines with 1. 2. etc. for numbered lists.

fields.name: videoSrc
fields.label: Video URL
fields.description: Vimeo or YouTube URL to embed

fields.name: videoSrc
fields.label: Video URL
fields.description: Vimeo or YouTube URL to embed

fields.name: rating
fields.label: Star Rating (1-5)
fields.description: Number of filled stars to display

fields.name: primaryHref
fields.label: Primary Button Link
fields.description: Use /page-slug for internal pages, or https://... for external URLs

fields.name: primaryExternal
fields.label: Open primary link in a new tab

fields.name: secondaryLabel
fields.label: Secondary Button Label (optional)
fields.description: Leave blank to show only one button

fields.name: secondaryHref
fields.label: Secondary Button Link
fields.description: Use /page-slug for internal pages, or https://... for external URLs

fields.name: secondaryExternal
fields.label: Open secondary link in a new tab

fields.name: embedCode
fields.label: Embed Code (HTML / Script)
fields.description: Paste an iframe or script tag. Only shown when Mode is 'Embed Code'.

fields.name: embedMinHeight
fields.label: Minimum Height (px)
fields.description: Minimum height of the embed area in pixels (default 600)

fields.name: columns
fields.label: Columns
fields.description: Number of columns (default: 2)

fields.name: iconColor
fields.label: Icon Color
fields.description: CSS color value (e.g. var(--color-azure-1), #FF08CC)

fields.name: href
fields.label: Link
fields.description: URL the card links to (e.g. /resources/podcast)

description.value: References another document, used as a foreign key
